name: lock-req
description: Lock human-approved requirement review candidate into authority files.

tasks.activeForm: Confirming human approval before locking requirements
tasks.detail: Confirm the user/human explicitly approved the current req JSON review candidate. Do not infer approval from draft/finalize pass. Record the approver name that will be used as ATLAS_APPROVED_BY. Do not run lock commands until approval is explicit.
tasks.criteria:
Explicit human approval for the current candidate is cited
Approver name for ATLAS_APPROVED_BY is known
The candidate was finalized or otherwise reviewed
No implementation artifacts were modified

tasks.activeForm: Stamping locked truth files from approved req candidate
tasks.detail: Run the deterministic lock stamper from the existing req candidate files. This is allowed only after explicit human approval. It writes locked_truth.md and approval_manifest.json, and may normalize requirement status to locked.
tasks.criteria:
lock_requirement_set.py --from-candidate exits 0
req/locked_truth.md exists
req/approval_manifest.json exists
approval_manifest status is requirements_locked
approval_manifest records the real human approver
bundle hashes are recorded

tasks.detail: Run the deterministic locked bundle checker. Failure means the lock is invalid and must be repaired before SSOT or implementation.
tasks.criteria:
check_locked_truth_bundle.py exits 0
Manifest status is requirements_locked
Manifest hashes match disk files
Required requirements are locked/approved
requirement -> obligation -> contract_ref -> evidence_plan references close
locked_truth.md hash matches manifest

tasks.content: [REQ] Handoff: locked truth may feed SSOT
tasks.activeForm: Summarizing locked requirement handoff to SSOT
tasks.detail: Read req/approval_manifest.json and report locked bundle paths, requirement count, bundle hash, and next allowed action. Only after this task may /to-ssot or SSOT generation proceed.
tasks.criteria:
approval_manifest.json was read from disk
requirements_index.json path is reported
bundle_sha256 is reported
Next action is SSOT generation, not RTL/TB/SIM directly
No workflow stages were run during req lock
